title: トラブル上等！？美浦寮長走る！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an average morning over at Miho Dorm, and
all is going well until it suddenly isn't.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that wraps up morning practice. Time for a
quick shower.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Hishiamaaaaa! It's an emergency!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What happened?!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: It's better if you see it for yourself! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eeek! Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The heck is going on?! It's like a hurricane ripped
through the halls!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
There's a mouse! A super big mouse snuck its way
in!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh, a mouse? What are you all freaking out so
much for over a little mou—

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text: Watch out, Hishiama! Save yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zoom!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That can't be what I think it is... That's the mouse?! It's as big as a kettle!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: I told you it was super big! But that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: TWEET-TWEET! Cease your scurrying at once, mouse! Entering the dorm without permission is against academy rules!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That mouse is getting all of the attention... It's
not fair! Two can play that game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, crash! Thu-thunk, crash!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh. So the mouse has students acting up too...

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
What do we do now?! This will be the end of the
dorm as we know it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What do we do? That's obvious! There's only one
thing I can do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Everyone, CALM DOWN!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We are students of Tracen Academy—all this
yelling and hollering is embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Remember how you are when you're runnin'! We
aren't gonna lose to a mouse, are we?!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
Trust our Hishiama to quiet things down with a
good yell!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, now that everyone's calm, time to get to
business...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That mouse picked on the wrong dorm! Let's give
it a fright, and show it how scary we are here at
Miho!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
So we're just going to chase after it?! Shouldn't
we have a strategy or something?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why're you lookin' at me to make a good
plan?! Fuji's the one with the smarts, not me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to some good ol' teamwork, we've got
it cornered!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now, what to do with this little rascal?

text_block_list.name: Mouse
text_block_list.text: Squeak... Squeak, squeak!

text_block_list.name: Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaah! It's coming this way!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Argh, it's running straight toward the girl who's
bad with mice! Dang it, it's gonna escape at this
ra—

text_block_list.name: Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text:
N-no! We're residents of Miho Dormitory! And we
never back down from a race!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Shoo it over to where Hishiama is and
she'll handle the rest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Urk... I w-won't let you through!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Let's corner it off together...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You guys!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Hishiama, go, now! Please catch it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come at me, squeakums! I'm challenging you to a
one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Mouse
text_block_list.text: Squeak?!

text_block_list.name: Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: You caught the mouse! Yay, we did it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Good work, everyone! You really showed your
stuff! After we release this guy back into the
wild...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's tidy this place up and put this all to rest.
Come on, follow my lead!

text_block_list.name: Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I don't care if you're a mousy interloper
or an Horsegirl troublemaker, I'm taking you all on!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Oh no, Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Mouse
text_block_list.text: Squeak, squeak!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Mouse—captured! Who's next?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Show yourself, mouse! Where are you?! Under the
floorboards, is it?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, quit trying to pry those open! Bakushin
O—captured! Who's neeext?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha... I'll take advantage of this chaos and
become a mouse myself! I'll make myself a
costume!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You there! You—you want to become a mouse?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Forget it, I'll ask questions later! Windy—captured! Who's next?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... That should be everyone who needs to be restrained...

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
Nice job, Hishiama! I can't believe you handled it
all on your own!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I was so reckless while chasin' everyone
down that the dorm's a complete disaster now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Dang it, I'm the dorm leader here! I should've
kept my act together and done a better job of
this...
